title: Scott Gasch
text: Home * People * Scott Gasch Scott Gasch [1] Scott Gasch , an American computer scientist, and software engineer at Google Inc. since 2005, before affiliated with Microsoft . He holds a B.Sc. in computer science from Virginia Tech . Scott is author of the open source chess programs Monsoon and its multithreaded successor Typhoon [2] .
